MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
John V. Mejia, Esq., 439-5391, counsel for plaintiff Anna Harris, moving to be relieved as counsel
Katherine S. Catlos, Esq. of LEWIS BRISBOIS 438-6665, for defendant not opposing the motion

RULING:
No appearance of plaintiff. Plaintiff's counsel presented the proof of service per CRC 317(c) to the Court. The Court granted PLAINTIFF ANNA HARRIS' Counsel's Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (DAG/301/JU) Reporter: Beldon Yee CSR #2647
